creator: jilles@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note that forked-daapd_enable is not a valid variable name in sh. Perhaps sysrc should handle this more gracefully but trying to set forked-daapd_enable in /etc/rc.conf is not going to do anything other than write a "not found" error message.

The right solution to the original problem is likely to name the variable forked_daapd_enable or similar.
